claim_boundary: The normalized charged-current action term, not arithmetic channel-count coincidence, must select the CKM transport space.

action_evidence_against: candidate terms also contain + h.c.; normalized action does not select one-way-only transport
spaces.what_would_falsify_it: an action theorem requiring Hermitian adjoint-pair closure or a different transport algebra
spaces.what_would_select_it: a normalized action term declaring J_ud as the transport operator without adjoint-pair channel counting

action_evidence_against: + h.c. is not yet tied to normalized BHSM action selection
spaces.interpretation: off-diagonal charged-current map plus Hermitian adjoint
spaces.what_would_falsify_it: an action theorem selecting one-way, sector-self, total-endomorphism, or maximal-self transport instead
spaces.what_would_select_it: a normalized action theorem proving the off-diagonal map and conjugate term are jointly required

action_evidence_against: not the located charged-current target form
action_evidence_for: charged incidence audits track sector dimensions 1, 2, 4
spaces.what_would_falsify_it: an action theorem restricting transport to off-diagonal charged-current maps
spaces.what_would_select_it: a normalized charged action showing CKM transport averages sector self-responses

action_evidence_against: no located charged-current action acts on all charged endomorphisms
action_evidence_for: recorded as a competing algebraic assignment
spaces.what_would_falsify_it: a theorem selecting the smaller one-way or adjoint-pair charged-current block
spaces.what_would_select_it: a normalized action term with domain/codomain V_ch and full End(V_ch) transport

action_evidence_against: same numerical dimension does not establish physical source
action_evidence_for: same numerical dimension as the adjoint-pair candidate
spaces.what_would_falsify_it: an action theorem selecting off-diagonal charged-current transport or another space
spaces.what_would_select_it: explicit action evidence reviving End(V_d) as charged-current transport
